source: Luat Thue GTGT 2008 (sua doi 2013, 2016), Nghi dinh 209/2013/ND-CP, Nghi quyet giam VAT tung giai doan

applies_to: thiet bi, dung cu y te
giao duc, day nghe (mot so dich vu)
san pham nong nghiep chua qua che bien o khau thuong mai
dich vu khoa hoc cong nghe
hang hoa, dich vu duoc giam theo Nghi quyet Quoc hoi tung ky (kiem tra ky hieu luc)
reduced_rates.note: Uu dai tam thoi — xac minh theo nghi quyet gan nhat truoc khi ap dung

exempt: san pham nong nghiep chua che bien do nguoi san xuat ban truc tiep
dich vu y te, giao duc cong
xuat khau (thue suat 0%, hoan thue dau vao)

applies_to: dich vu xuat khau thoa man dieu kien

declaration_frequency.note: Doanh nghiep doanh thu nam truoc <= 50 ty khai quy; > 50 ty khai thang.
